competitors.value_citation: MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX) is the primary company reporting news.

keywords.value_citation: Mentioned as the lead indication for sonelokimab in the MoonLake press release.
Abbreviation used for Hidradenitis suppurativa throughout the release.
Mentioned as the target (IL-17A and IL-17F) for sonelokimab.

findings.source_type_citation: MoonLake press release titled "MoonLake Immunotherapeutics Announces Positive Outcome from its Final Pre-BLA Meeting with the U.S. FDA and Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results" dated May 10, 2026.
findings.competitors_citation: The press release specifically reports on MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX). It also mentions adalimumab, secukinumab, and risankizumab as reference/control arms.
findings.keywords_citation: The press release mentions "hidradenitis suppurativa (HS)" as the lead indication and "IL-17A and IL-17F" as the mechanism of action for sonelokimab.
findings.summary: MoonLake announced a positive outcome from its final pre-BLA meeting with the FDA for sonelokimab in HS, with a BLA submission planned for September 2026. The company also reported Q1 2026 financial results with $357.9 million in cash.
findings.summary_citation: Summary based on the bullet points and financial results section of the MoonLake press release dated May 10, 2026.
findings.publication_date_citation: The press release is dated "May 10 2026" in the header and "May 10, 2026" in the dateline.
findings.source_link_citation: Direct URL to the press release on the MoonLake IR website.
findings.source_domain_citation: Domain of the source URL provided.
